args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Plan to convert the website from a tab-based interface into a premium, single-page continuous scrolling layout with $100k-tier design aesthetics.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# Convert to Premium Single-Page Scrolling Layout

The goal is to transition the website from its current "tabbed" architecture (where clicking the bottom dock switches out the content) into a continuous, single-page scrolling experience. This creates a more immersive, modern, and high-end feel (a "$100k design"), allowing users to effortlessly scroll through the company's entire narrative.

## Proposed Changes

### 1. `index.html` (Structure Updates)
- Un-nest the content from hidden `.tab-content` divs and stack them sequentially as proper semantic `<section>` tags.
- Update the bottom dock navigation `<li>` items to function as anchor links (`href="#about"`, `href="#projects"`, etc.) instead of data-tab triggers.

### 2. `style.css` (Premium Visual Overhaul)
- **Remove Tab Logic**: Remove `display: none` from `.tab-content`. Stack sections vertically.
- **Smooth Scrolling**: Apply `scroll-behavior: smooth;` to the `html` element.
- **Spacing & Rhythm**: Drastically increase padding/margins (`100px` to `150px`) between major sections to give the design "breathing room"—a hallmark of premium design.
- **Glassmorphic Mesh Background**: Add a subtle, fixed, ambient gradient mesh background that stays behind the scrolling content to tie everything together.
- **Scroll Snap / Anchoring**: Ensure the top header and bottom dock have strong glassmorphic `backdrop-filter: blur()` effects so text smoothly slides underneath them without clashing.

### 3. `app.js` (Scroll Spy & Animations)
- **Remove Click-to-Switch Tab Logic**: Remove the JavaScript that hides/shows content blocks based on dock clicks.
- **Add Scroll Spy**: Implement an `IntersectionObserver` that tracks which section is currently in the viewport and automatically highlights the correct icon in the bottom floating dock.
- **Reveal on Scroll**: Add a universal scroll-reveal observer to gently fade and slide elements up as the user scrolls down the page, enhancing the dynamic feel.

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT
<truncated 811 bytes>
args.Description: "Drafting implementation plan for single-page scrolling layout"

args.CodeContent:
"# Premium Single-Page Conversion Tasks

- [ ] `index.html` Updates
  - [ ] Convert `.tab-content` divs to `<section class="page-section" id="...">`
  - [ ] Update dock items to `href="#..."` anchor links
- [ ] `style.css` Updates
  - [ ] Add `scroll-behavior: smooth` to `html`
  - [ ] Remove `.tab-content` hiding/showing logic
  - [ ] Add premium padding/margins between sections (`150px`+)
  - [ ] Add ambient premium gradient background mesh
  - [ ] Adjust dock padding and glassmorphic blur to sit above scrollable content
- [ ] `app.js` Updates
  - [ ] Remove old click-based tab switching logic
  - [ ] Add `IntersectionObserver` to highlight active dock item on scroll
  - [ ] Add universal scroll reveal animation observer for `.reveal-on-scroll` elements
- [ ] Verification
  - [ ] Ensure layout flows beautifully from top to bottom
  - [ ] Ensure translations still work accurately"

args.Description: "Update hero description with the user's provided message in all languages"
args.Instruction: "Update heroDesc object with new text"
args.ReplacementContent:
" en: \"Welcome to PSL Group.

PSL Construction Complete Sole Co., Ltd. is a proud 100% Lao-invested enterprise established in 2018. With continuous growth and expansion, we upgraded our structure to become a full-fledged PSL Group in 2025. We have extensive expertise and rich experience in infrastructure development, government procurement and contracting, and advanced technology development, contributing to the sustainable development of the nation.\",\n la: \"ຍິນດີຕ້ອນຮັບເຂົ້າສູ່ ກຸ່ມບໍລິສັດ ພີເອັດສແອວ (PSL Group).

ບໍລິສັດ ພີເອັດສແອວ ກໍ່ສ້າງຄົບວົງຈອນ ຈຳກັດຜູ້ດຽວ ແມ່ນຄວາມພາກພູມໃຈຂອງທຸລະກິດທີ່ລົງທຶນໂດຍຄົນລາວ 100% ເຊິ່ງໄດ້ຮັບການສ້າງຕັ້ງຂຶ້ນໃນປີ 2018. ດ້ວຍການເຕີບໃຫຍ່ ແລະ ການຂະຫຍາຍຕົວຢ່າງຕໍ່ເນື່ອງ, ພວກເຮົາໄດ້ຍົກລະດັບໂຄງສ້າງກາຍເປັນ ກຸ່ມບໍລິສັດ PSL Group ຢ່າງເຕັມຮູບແບບໃນປີ 2025. ພວກເຮົາມີຄວາມຊ່ຽວຊານ ແລະ ປະສົບການອັນອຸດົມສົມບູນ ໃນການພັດທະນາພື້ນຖານໂຄງລ່າງ, ການສະໜອງວຽກງານຈັດຊື້-ຈັດຈ້າງໃຫ້ແກ່ອົງການຈັດຕັ້ງພາກລັດ, ແລະ ການພັດທະນາເຕັກໂນໂລຊີອັນທັນສະໄໝ ເພື່ອປະກອບສ່ວນເຂົ້າໃນການສ້າງສາພັດທະນາປະເທດຊາດຢ່າງຍືນຍົງ.\",\n zh: \"欢迎来到 PSL 集团。

PSL 建筑
args.TargetContent: "        en: \"PSL Group is a 100% Lao-owned company founded in 2018. Restructured in 2025 with a registered capital of 50 Billion LAK, we specialize in major infrastructure development, government defense procurement, and advanced technological innovation.\",\n        la: \"ບໍລິສັດ ພີເອັດສແອວ ກໍ່ສ້າງຄົບວົງຈອນ ຈຳກັດຜູ້ດຽວ (PSL) ແມ່ນບໍລິສັດຂອງຄົນລາວ 100% ທີ່ສ້າງຕັ້ງຂຶ້ນໃນປີ 2018 ແລະ ໄດ້ປ່ຽນແປງໂຄງຮ່າງໃນປີ 2025 ເປັນ ກຸ່ມບໍລິສັດ PSL Group ດ້ວຍທຶນຈົດທະບຽນ 50 ຕື້ກີບ. ພວກເຮົາມີຄວາມຊ່ຽວຊານໃນການພັດທະນາໂຄງລ່າງພື້ນຖານ, ການຈັດຊື້-ຈັດຈ້າງໃຫ້ພາກລັດ, ແລະ ການພັດທະນາເຕັກໂນໂລຊີອັນທັນສະໄໝ.\",\n        zh: \"PSL集团是一家成立于2018年的100%老挝全资公司。我们在2025年进行了重组，注册资本为500亿基普。我们专注于重大基础设施开发、政府国防采购以及先进技术创新。\""

This is achieved through a development strategy that emphasizes the use of innovation, sustainable cooperation with domestic and international experts, and a focus on developing Lao personnel into professionals under the 5 core factors that form our commitment: transparency and honesty in every step of the work, safety standards as the highest priority, excellent quality according to international standards, architectural beauty in harmony with the environment, and strict on-time delivery for maximum customer satisfaction.\",\n            la: \"PSL ຈະກ້າວຂຶ້ນເປັນຜູ້ນຳດ້ານການພັດທະນາພື້ນຖານໂຄງລ່າງຄົບວົງຈອນໃນລະດັບສາກົນ ໂດຍການເຊື່ອມໂຍງນະວັດຕະກຳ ແລະ ເຕັກໂນໂລຊີທີ່ທັນສະໄໝເຂົ້າໃນຂະບວນການກໍ່ສ້າງ ເພື່ອສ້າງສັນຜົນງານທີ່ຍືນຍົງ, ຍົກລະດັບຄຸນນະພາບຊີວິດຂອງສັງຄົມ ແລະ ສ້າງຄວາມເຊື່ອໝັ້ນໃຫ້ແກ່ເຈົ້າຂອງໂຄງການ ໂດຍຜ່ານແຜນຍຸດທະສາດການພັດທະນາທີ່ເນັ້ນການນຳໃຊ້ນະວັດຕະກຳ, ການຮ່ວມມືແບບຍືນຍົງກັບຜູ້ຊ່ຽວຊານທັງພາຍໃນ ແລະ ຕ່າງປະເທດ, ພ້ອມທັງເອົາໃຈໃສ່ພັດທະນາບຸກຄະລາກອນລາວໃຫ້ເປັນມືອ

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan for redesigning the hero section and executive card to improve information density and add a premium aesthetic.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# Redesign Hero Section & Executive Card

The goal of this plan is to eliminate excessive whitespace, increase information density, and drastically upgrade the CEO/Contact card to a premium, luxurious standard using high-end UI techniques like glassmorphism.

## User Review Required
> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Please review the proposed CSS and HTML structural changes below. This will significantly alter the look of the top of the page. Once approved, I will implement the new design.

## Proposed Changes

### CSS (style.css)

#### [MODIFY] `style.css`
- **Global Spacing**: 
  - Reduce `#home` padding-top from `40px` to `1rem` or remove it entirely to eliminate the top gap.
  - Reduce `.hero-section` and `.philosophy-section` spacing so the content is tighter and denser.
- **Hero Grid Balance**:
  - Update `.hero-grid` from `1fr 450px` to `1fr 480px` (or `3fr 2fr`), tightening the `gap` to create a more cohesive lockup between the left text and right card.
- **Premium Glassmorphism Card**:
  - Completely rewrite `.hero-meta` using advanced glassmorphism:
    ```css
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) 100%);
    backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(180%);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
    ```
  - Enhance the gold accent to be a sleek metallic line.
- **Card Inner Typography & Icons**:
  - Update `.meta-label` to be ultra-clean: `font-size: 0.75rem`, `letter-spacing: 0.15em`, `text-transform: uppercase`, using a muted gold or subtle gray.
  - Update `.meta-value` for high contrast and elegance.

### HTML (index.html)

#### [MODIFY] `index.html`
- **Icon Integration**:
  - Inject sleek, modern, minimalist SVG icons (User, Map Pin, Phone, Envelope/Globe) next to the labels in the Executive Card to make it feel like a premium business card.
- **HTML Structure**:
  - Wrap the inner content of the card slightly differently if ne
<truncated 377 bytes>
args.Description: "Implementation plan for redesigning the hero section"

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan for Project Details Modal and adding new projects.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# Implementation Plan: Project Details Modal & New Projects

This plan addresses your request to add rich project details via a clickable modal, integrate the 3 new mega projects you provided, and fix duplicated photos across all 15 projects.

## Proposed Changes

### 1. Add New Projects (Group 3)
I will add a new section in the HTML for **Group 3: Mega Strategic & Ongoing Projects** (ໝວດທີ 3: ໂຄງການຍຸດທະສາດລະດັບຊາດ) to include:
- 10 Roads Infrastructure in Vientiane
- 19km Riverbank Protection in Khammouane
- National Highways Upgrade (4 Routes)

### 2. Implement Project Details Modal
- **HTML**: Create a hidden `<div id="project-modal" class="modal">` containing elements for the image, title, location, technical specs, and full details.
- **JavaScript**: 
  - Store the full, rich details you provided (in Lao, English, and Chinese) in a structured format in `script.js`.
  - Add click event listeners to all `<article class="project-entry">` cards.
  - When a card is clicked, populate the modal with the specific project's data and animate it into view.
- **CSS**: Style the modal to look luxurious and premium, utilizing the glassmorphism and subtle gold accents we used in the hero section.

### 3. Fix Duplicated Photos
Currently, a few projects share the same placeholder image (like the Pharmaceutical Factory and Garment Factory).
- I will generate or select completely unique placeholders for any project that does not have a real photo.
- Every single one of the 15 projects will have a distinct, visually striking image.

## User Review Required
> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Please review this approach. If this sounds perfect, click **Proceed** and I will immediately build the modal system, add the 3 new projects, and fix all duplicated photos!"
args.Description: "Implementation plan for project modals and new projects"

"

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Walkthrough of the completed project details modal, mega projects addition, duplicate photo fixes, and hero section redesign.","UserFacing":true}
args.CodeContent:
"# 🚀 Redesign & Feature Walkthrough

I have successfully completed the massive overhaul of both the **Premium Hero Section** and the new **Project Details Modal** system!

## 1. Premium Hero Section Redesign
- **Glassmorphism Executive Card**: The CEO/Contact card on the right has been completely redesigned with a stunning frosted glass (`backdrop-filter`) effect, subtle metallic gold borders, and soft drop shadows to give it a highly luxurious and corporate feel.
- **Improved Information Density & Spacing**: The excessive whitespace at the top has been removed. The grid has been tightened and optimized so the company introduction text and the executive card balance perfectly.
- **Minimalist Iconography**: Added elegant, gold-tinted circular icon boxes (`meta-icon-box`) for the email, phone, and address to replace the basic form-like look.

## 2. Interactive Project Details Modal
- **Click-to-Open Functionality**: Every single project card on the website is now interactive. When you click a card, a sleek, animated modal popup appears over the screen.
- **Rich Data Integration**: All 15 projects have been hardcoded into the new `script.js` file with the exact rich, multi-lingual details you provided! Depending on the active language (Lao, English, Chinese), the modal will intelligently display the correct title and full description.

## 3. 3 New Mega Strategic Projects Added
I added the massive **Group 3: Mega Strategic & Ongoing Projects** (ໂຄງການຍຸດທະສາດລະດັບຊາດ) to the portfolio section, including:
1. 10 Roads Infrastructure in Vientiane
2. 19km Riverbank Protection in Khammouane
3. National Highways Upgrade (4 Routes)

## 4. Fixed Duplicated Photos
I generated **3 brand new, hyper-realistic, wide-angle construction photos** specifically for the new Mega Projects:
- A modern city road paving site (`city_roads.png`)
- A riverbank erosion protection site with gabions (`riverbank.png`)
- A massive national highway carving through lush mountains 
<truncated 555 bytes>
